overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban street under an elevated highway. The scene features a blend of traditional Japanese and cyberpunk architecture with pedestrians, parked vehicles, and palm trees. Bright morning sunlight creates strong shadows on the pavement.

events.description: approaching the corner of the traditional building, preparing to turn left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the elevated highway toward the traditional cyberpunk building ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the same direction

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning overhead with visible support beams
black building with distinctive curved Japanese temple-style roof and futuristic metallic facade
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
large orange geometric archway structure in the background
illuminated advertising screens on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive elevated highway overpass toward a distinctive black building with traditional Japanese architectural elements mixed with cyberpunk aesthetics. The area is partially shaded with bright sunlight visible in the distance. Sparse pedestrians are visible walking ahead on the tiled pavement.

events.description: turning left to follow the sidewalk along the building facade

agents.ego_description: turning left at the building corner and walking along the sidewalk, following a pedestrian in a red jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green dumpster with blue trash bags piled beside it
long rectangular concrete planter with dry vegetation and palm trees
sleek black futuristic cars parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: Turning left to walk along the side of the black traditional-cyberpunk building, now in brighter sunlight. The sidewalk features a concrete planter with palm trees on the left and parked futuristic vehicles along the street. A pedestrian in a red jacket walks ahead, leading the way along the narrow passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban sidewalk with parked vehicles and palm trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past parked vehicles and palm trees, approaching a more open intersection area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall modern street lamp with red fixture

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the open sidewalk with the traditional-cyberpunk building now receding into the background on the right. Parked futuristic vehicles line the left side while palm trees provide sparse shade. The scene opens up toward a busier intersection ahead with tall skyscrapers visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shaded depths of an urban overpass into a bright, open futuristic thoroughfare. It begins by walking under a massive elevated highway toward a black building that blends traditional Japanese architecture with cyberpunk aesthetics, while sparse pedestrians move across the tiled pavement. As the camera turns left, the scene shifts from shadow into brilliant morning sunlight, passing a concrete planter with palm trees and parked futuristic vehicles. The perspective then continues along the sidewalk as the black building recedes into the background, leaving the path open to the street. Finally, the view expands toward a busy intersection where towering skyscrapers rise in the distance under a clear sky.
